title: BOOK APPOINTMENT
note: Note: Vinmec hotline staff will call back to confirm the appointment time based on your registration and make adjustments if necessary.
smsNote: Note: SMS confirmation is only available for local phone numbers. If you are using an international number, please provide a valid email to receive confirmation code and booking details.
agreePolicyText: I have read and agree to
agreePolicyText2: and consent to Vinmec processing my personal data in accordance with data protection regulations.
pleaseAgreePolicy: Please agree to the personal data protection policy
bookingSuccess: Appointment booked successfully! We will contact you soon.
